name: whisper-large-v3-turbo
notes: Whisper large-v3/large-v3-turbo encoder input is a 30 second log-mel window.
Upload only output/final/SAMSUNG_UPLOAD_WHISPER_ENCODER.onnx to Samsung SDK Service.
The compact model uses FP32 ONNX LayerNormalization ops and is pre-simplified before upload.
ONNX simplification skips fuse_qkv because Samsung EAIS Gen-6 can fail fused QKV attention profiling at the first attention reshape.
Whisper query-scale Mul nodes are folded into q_proj weights and biases because EAIS can also fail at the first attention query reshape after an unsupported standalone Mul.
This candidate is still under Samsung SDK Service testing.
Tokenizer/preprocessor/config files are app/runtime assets, not NPU binaries.
